  • Uses of ChatChannel in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI

    Methods in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI that return ChatChannel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ChatChannel
    YoChatAPI.createChannel(String channelName, int radius, boolean strictWorld, Set<String> worlds)
    Creates a new ChatChannel instance using YoChat's channel manager.
    static @Nullable ChatChannel
    YoChatAPI.getChannel(String name)
    Looks up a registered channel by name.
    static @Nullable ChatChannel
    YoChatAPI.getChannelByPlayer(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Returns the channel the given player currently belongs to.
    Methods in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI that return types with arguments of type ChatChannel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NonNull @Unmodifiable Collection<ChatChannel>
    YoChatAPI.getChannels()
    Returns a snapshot of all currently registered channels.
    Methods in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI with parameters of type ChatChannel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component
    YoChatAPI.formatChannelMessage(ChatChannel channel, org.bukkit.entity.Player sender, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
    Formats a message using a specific channel's format.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.joinChannel(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, ChatChannel channel)
    Moves a player into the given channel.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.registerChannel(ChatChannel channel)
    Registers a chat channel so it can be used by YoChat.
    static void
    YoChatAPI.sendToChannel(ChatChannel channel, org.bukkit.entity.Player sender, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
    Sends a message through a specific channel using YoChat's channel formatting and delivery rules.

    YoChatPipelineEvent.setChannel(ChatChannel channel)
    Replaces the current channel and mirrors the change back into the context.

    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a new pipeline event.

    Creates a new send event.
